github.description: GitHub user/org handle. Drives r-universe lookups and the filename for this entry.

directory_id.description: Slug of the author's entry in rladies/directory.

package_sync.description: Controls automated package syncing from r-universe.

enabled.description: When false, the periodic sync skips this author entirely.

exclude.description: Package names to skip during sync, even if r-universe lists the author.
